name: agent-bridge
desc: A local bridge for bidirectional collaboration between Claude Code and Codex. 连接 Claude Code 与 Codex 的本地实时协作桥接工具。

name: Equibles
desc: An open-source, self-hosted mini Bloomberg Terminal for AI agents — SEC filings, institutional holdings, insider trading, congressional trades, and short data from a single self-hosted stack.

name: CubeSandbox
desc: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

name: OpenViking
desc: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

name: alook
desc: The collaboration layer for your AI workforce. Run a team of AI agents that coordinate over email, share memory, and get better with every task.

name: crewAI
desc: Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. By fostering collaborative intelligence, CrewAI empowers agents to work together seamlessly, tackling complex tasks.

name: caracal
desc: 🐾 Caracal is a security-first AI authority, delegation, and identity system for autonomous agents.

name: awesome-openclaw
desc: A curated list of OpenClaw resources, tools, skills, tutorials & articles. OpenClaw (formerly Moltbot / Clawdbot) — open-source self-hosted AI agent for WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord & 50+ integrations.

name: cli
desc: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 20+ AI Agent Skills.

name: studio
desc: Open-source control plane for your AI agents. Connect tools, hire agents, track every token and dollar
